security.csp: default-src 'self' notion.so *.notion.so notion-static.com tauri://localhost wry://localhost; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval' notion.so *.notion.so notion-static.com tauri://localhost wry://localhost; connect-src 'self' notion.so *.notion.so notion-static.com tauri://localhost wry://localhost; img-src 'self' data: blob: notion.so *.notion.so notion-static.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' notion.so *.notion.so; font-src 'self' data: notion.so *.notion.so;

bundle.longDescription: lotion-rs is a native Rust desktop client for Notion.so, built with Tauri v2. Features Zero-Trust security, LiteBox sandboxing, and custom theming.
